# gcore_waap_domain (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "gcore_waap_domain" "example_waap_domain" {
  domain_id = 1
  status = "active"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain_id` (Number) The domain ID
- `status` (String) The current status of the domain
Available values: "active", "monitor".

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The date and time the domain was created in ISO 8601 format
- `custom_page_set` (Number) The ID of the custom page set
- `id` (Number) The domain ID
- `name` (String) The domain name
- `quotas` (Attributes Map) Domain level quotas (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--quotas))

<a id="nestedatt--quotas"></a>
### Nested Schema for `quotas`

Read-Only:

- `allowed` (Number) The maximum allowed number of this resource
- `current` (Number) The current number of this resource

# gcore_waap_domain (Resource)

WAAP domains enable Web Application and API Protection for monitoring and defending web applications against security threats.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "gcore_waap_domain" "example_waap_domain" {
  domain_id = 1
  status = "active"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain_id` (Number) The domain ID
- `status` (String) The current status of the domain
Available values: "active", "monitor".

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The date and time the domain was created in ISO 8601 format
- `custom_page_set` (Number) The ID of the custom page set
- `id` (Number) The domain ID
- `name` (String) The domain name
- `quotas` (Attributes Map) Domain level quotas (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--quotas))

<a id="nestedatt--quotas"></a>
### Nested Schema for `quotas`

Read-Only:

- `allowed` (Number) The maximum allowed number of this resource
- `current` (Number) The current number of this resource
